productName: Drops 4:1 CBD Comfort Blueberry / Cereal Milk
description: An artisan sweet, ripe blueberry edible made to feel special — rich flavor, soft sweetness, and a cannabis finish that stays smooth and approachable. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 4:1 ratio. A flavorful hybrid option for customers who want their cannabis wrapped in something genuinely craveable.
